title: Dirtblock Skyblock
description: A twist on the classic skyblock map, inspired by the Dirt Platform Mod by HappyFish.
body:
Dirtblock is a chaotic mod that fully reworks game progression by deleting the entire world and placing you on a 3x3x2 dirt cube in the void. No trees, no structures, and no mob spawns. You must make everything that ever exists in your world. However, due to the crafting trees, it is possible to beat the game (kinda...)

Inspired by the Dirt Platform mod by HappyFish on CurseForge. Recommended to play with QoL mods like JEI due to the insane crafting trees. Mod is unfinished for now.

Also, JEI doesn't show custom brewing stand recipes, so here are some:
Netherrack + Water Bucket = Blood Bucket
Netherrack + Water Bottle = Blood Bottle
Silicone Powder + Water Bucket = Silicone Bucket
Coal + Iron Ingot = Steel Ingot

![Platform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/717d84d687272f11301c87877340950a3d1035a7.png)
